## Priority
**Priority:** P0 (Critical) / P1 (High) / P2 (Medium) / P3 (Low)  
**Severity:** Blocker / Critical / Major / Minor

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Bug reproduced and confirmed
- [ ] Root cause identified
- [ ] Fix implemented
- [ ] Tests added to prevent regression
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Deployed and verified
